data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement 'Room assignment with conflict checks', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on creating resources and handling bookings, but they do not include any checks or validations related to room assignments or conflict management. This indicates a clear gap in the saga lifecycle regarding the necessary validation of room assignments.
gaps: No evidence of room assignment checks or conflict management.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement room assignment conflict checks
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that room assignments do not conflict with existing bookings.
